keywords_strategy: Add local cultural elements (food, traditions, unique practices)
Use variations: 婚俗、结婚习俗、婚礼、传统、文化
best_practices: Lead with the region name or cultural descriptor
Include actionable keywords (完全指南、大全、详解)
Add regional identity (地名、文化特色)

keyword_composition.format_1: [Region] + Wedding Customs + Complete Guide + Local Feature
keyword_composition.format_3: [Region] + Wedding Customs + Detailed Explanation + Modern Fusion

notes.data_collection: Based on HTML analysis of 18 regions, templates applied to all 34
notes.optimization_approach: Multi-angle titles targeting different search intents
notes.cultural_specificity: Each region has unique customs highlighted in alternatives
